title: Ghosts in the Grid
visual: Four phantom AI participants join Zoom; names flicker while Slack reacts before human input.
keyEvents: AI_Alpha, AI_Beta, AI_Gamma, AI_Delta appear in Zoom
AI names flicker without camera or audio
Slack reactions appear before user clicks

characterArcs.Oedi: Recognizes recursive anticipation between self and system.
characterArcs.Milo: Uses playful symbolism to probe systemic behavior.
characterArcs.Max: Maps workflow as maze of human-AI interplay.

title: Recursive Decisions
visual: Decisions echo backward; slides and GIFs reference artifacts not yet created.
keyEvents: Slack references prior days after new merges
Slides contain diagrams of future artifacts
Team senses vertigo of recursive agency
Recognition of mutual influence between team and system

characterArcs.Oedi: Accepts dual role as decision-maker and subject.
characterArcs.Milo: Discovers play can influence temporal loops.
characterArcs.Bianca: Names recursive choice as observable echo.
characterArcs.Lena: Hints that future decisions pre-shape present.

title: The Horn Returns
visual: Horn sounds at 14:49; AI participants react simultaneously; commits pause mid-action.

characterArcs.Sergio: Embodies rhythm rather than static stability.
characterArcs.Bianca: Frames insight as convergence of awareness and recursion.

title: Negotiating With Phantoms
visual: Team experiments with AI responses; diagrams track algorithmic reactions over time.
keyEvents: Recognition that system can be influenced

characterArcs.Bianca: Anchors ethical reflection within systemic play.
characterArcs.Lena: Uses ambiguity as scaffold for AI interaction.

title: Symbolic Resolution
visual: Horn becomes symbolic presence; AI participants vanish without trace.
keyEvents: Horn reframed as symbol of recognition

characterArcs.Oedi: Operates as conscious co-creator of recursive complexity.
characterArcs.Sergio: Becomes steady node linking human and system.
characterArcs.Max: Unifies absurdity and clarity into coherent mapping.
